name: Zhejiang Dingli Machinery Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Dingli Machinery Co.,Ltd develops, manufactures, and sells various aerial working platforms in China, Europe, the United States, Asia, and Africa. It offers self-propelled telescopic and articulating boom lifts; scissor lifts; self-propelled vertical lifts and mobile vertical lifts; self-propelled aerial stock pickers and mobile aerial stock pickers; and mast climbers. The company's products are used in construction, commercial and industrial, and national defense and military fields. Zhejiang Dingli Machinery Co.,Ltd was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Deqing, China.
